request_payload.exposure_text: As a former national security advisor, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy keeps us safe. It's not about isolation—it's about fair burden-sharing in our alliances. When every nation pulls its weight, we all gain stronger deterrence and better preparedness. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
